summary: Premium solar installation company website designed to generate high-quality leads through service showcase, portfolio gallery, customer testimonials, and direct contact channels (WhatsApp, call, form submission).
goals: Generate qualified leads via contact form, WhatsApp, and call buttons
Establish credibility through portfolio and customer testimonials
Explain solar benefits and ROI in accessible language
Drive consultation bookings and site surveys
Maintain competitive advantage through trust signals (certifications, warranties, experience)

brand.name: SunEnergy Pro
brand.tagline: Premium Solar Solutions for Your Home & Business
brand.description: Expert solar installation company specializing in residential and commercial solar energy systems with 12+ years of market experience.

footer_attribution.aria_label: Built by Growrix OS (opens in a new tab)

requestedFeatures: Lead capture form with multi-step option
assumptions: Company has 12+ years of established business (derived from trust signal preference)
Target audience spans residential and small commercial (based on service showcase request)
Lead generation is the primary KPI (user requirement)
Visual archetype is 'local-business-trust' (per brand-translation-rules for marketing_site + renewable_energy)
Dark theme + ThemeSwitcher included as mandatory UX infrastructure
MobileBottomNav (icon tab bar) included for mobile users
Portfolio is essential trust signal for lead generation
openQuestions: What is the company's exact service area (geographic region)?
What financing options are offered (solar loans, leases, PPAs)?
What is the typical project timeline for residential installation?
Are there case study metrics available (average savings, ROI period)?
What is the preferred mobile app for WhatsApp (business API or standard link)?
Should scheduling integration (Calendly, etc.) be embedded on the site?
